It constrains the reasoning context window to merely 2% of full-context ingestion while delivering a 12.5 point absolute accuracy gain. Furthermore, statistical analysis uncovers a strong positive linear correlation between an VLM's performance on logic reasoning and long-video understanding benchmarks, establishing agentic capability scaling as a new paradigm for multimodal comprehension.

AI.tldr: MemDreamer是一个即插即用的智能体框架，通过分层图记忆架构和工具增强检索将长视频理解解耦为感知与推理过程，仅使用2%的上下文窗口即可在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，并与人类专家差距缩小至3.7分，揭示了VLM的逻辑推理能力与长视频理解能力之间存在强线性相关。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在处理数小时级别的长时间视频时，由于处理完整视觉序列会导致极度的token爆炸和注意力稀释，难以有效建模长程时空依赖关系，亟需一种能够解耦感知与推理、将长视频理解转化为可控探索过程的新型框架。
AI.method: MemDreamer采用即插即用的智能体框架，通过增量流式视频构建分层图记忆，这是一种自上而下的三层语义抽象架构，底层基础图捕获时空和因果关系；推理时，推理模型通过工具增强的智能体检索，在观察-推理-行动循环中导航层级结构、搜索节点并遍历逻辑边，从而解耦感知与推理过程。
AI.result: MemDreamer在四个主流长视频理解基准上达到SOTA结果，将推理上下文窗口压缩至全上下文摄入的仅2%，同时带来12.5个绝对准确率点的提升，并将与人类专家的性能差距缩小至仅3.7分。
AI.conclusion: 统计分析揭示了VLM在逻辑推理基准和长视频理解基准上的性能之间存在强正线性相关，表明智能体能力的规模化扩展可作为多模态理解的新范式，为长视频理解提供了一条通过增强推理而非单纯扩大上下文窗口的有效路径。

title: From Vision to Text: A Compact Multimodal Approach for Robust, Cross-Domain Presentation Attack Detection on ID Cards
comment: Publication under the revision process on IEEE
summary: Cross-domain shifts challenge Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) on ID Cards, given the restricted data available due to privacy concerns. This work proposes a compact multimodal model, based on new generative and discriminative blocks, which combines visual and textual data for PAD on genuine and synthetic ID images. While multimodal models exhibit strong generalisation after supervised fine-tuning, they fail in zero-shot settings. Our findings underscore that model capacity and real-world data are essential for reliable PAD, while existing synthetic datasets may not reflect real-world challenges. We argue for a re-evaluation of synthetic data as a benchmark and emphasise the need for more realistic, diverse datasets to advance PAD research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉和文本数据的紧凑多模态模型用于身份证件呈现攻击检测，发现多模态模型在零样本设置下失效，指出现有合成数据集无法反映真实挑战，并强调需要重新评估合成数据基准并构建更真实多样的数据集。
AI.motivation: 跨领域偏移对身份证件呈现攻击检测构成挑战，且由于隐私限制可用数据极为有限，现有方法在多模态融合和零样本泛化方面存在不足，亟需探索更有效的检测方案。
AI.method: 提出一种紧凑的多模态模型，包含新的生成式和判别式模块，融合视觉和文本数据以检测真实和合成身份证图像的呈现攻击。
AI.result: 多模态模型在有监督微调后表现出强泛化能力，但在零样本设置下失效；模型容量和真实世界数据对可靠PAD至关重要，现有合成数据集无法反映真实挑战。
AI.conclusion: 应重新评估合成数据作为基准的有效性，并强调构建更真实、更多样化的数据集是推动呈现攻击检测研究的关键方向。

title: CL-CLIP: CLIP-Based Continual Learning Framework with Cost-Volume Category Decoupling for Object Detection
summary: Continual Object Detection (COD) requires a detector to acquire new categories over time while preserving previously learned ones. This goal is closely related to open-vocabulary detection, since both settings require reasoning over categories that are not fully covered by the annotations available at the current training stage. Recent CLIP-based open-vocabulary detectors have shown strong zero-shot generalization, and frameworks such as F-ViT demonstrate that vision-language pretraining can provide powerful zero-shot detection ability for unseen categories. However, real-world deployments cannot remain purely zero-shot: once these detectors are continually updated on newly introduced categories, they suffer severe catastrophic forgetting and quickly lose their previously calibrated detection ability. We therefore propose CL-CLIP, a CLIP-based COD framework that equips open-vocabulary detectors with better continual learning ability through cost-volume-guided category decoupling. Specifically, following CAT-Seg, we compute a CLIP image-text similarity cost volume, defined as dense category-wise response maps between visual tokens and class text embeddings. This zero-shot spatial prior decomposes shared region features into class-specific pathways, which are then processed by a Multi-Expert RoI head. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO show that CL-CLIP substantially improves the F-ViT baseline under continual fine-tuning and achieves competitive performance with existing continual object detectors, especially in adapting to newly introduced categories while preserving competitive base-class performance.

AI.tldr: 提出CL-CLIP框架，通过成本体积引导的类别解耦策略，为基于CLIP的开放词汇检测器赋予持续学习能力，在不遗忘基类的前提下有效适应新类别的增量学习。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP-based开放词汇检测器如F-ViT虽然具有强大的零样本检测能力，但在实际部署中需要对新引入类别进行持续更新时，会遭受严重的灾难性遗忘，迅速丢失先前校准的检测能力，导致开放词汇检测器缺乏有效的持续学习能力。
AI.method: 提出CL-CLIP框架，基于CAT-Seg的思路计算CLIP图像-文本相似度成本体积，即视觉token与类别文本嵌入之间的密集类别响应图，以此作为零样本空间先验将共享区域特征分解为类别特定通路，再由多专家（Multi-Expert）RoI head分别处理，实现类别解耦与持续学习。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS-COCO上的大量实验表明，CL-CLIP显著提升了F-ViT基线在持续微调下的性能，在适应新引入类别的同时保持具有竞争力的基类检测能力，与现有持续目标检测器相比达到了竞争性表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过成本体积引导的类别解耦策略可以有效缓解CLIP-based检测器在持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，证明了将开放词汇检测的零样本先验与持续学习机制相结合是一条可行且有效的技术路径。

title: Never Seen Before: Benchmarking Genuine Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval with Consistent Video-Sourced Datasets
summary: Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval (ZS-CIR) aims to retrieve a target image based on a query composed of a reference image and a relative caption without training samples. Existing ZS-CIR datasets often suffer from complete irrelevance between reference and target images due to noisy image sources, and do not achieve a true zero-shot scenario as they use public image datasets that models like CLIP have been trained on. To tackle these challenges, we introduce ZeroSight, a novel benchmark for ZS-CIR. It includes a dataset with consistent reference-target pairs sourced from videos, a data construction pipeline, and evaluation methods that consider the ranking of multiple positive and negative target images. We ensure visually and semantically consistent reference-target pairs by extracting frames from a single video and generating relative captions using LLM-assisted methods. To ensure a true zero-shot scenario, we use video data published after March 31, 2022, ensuring it was not included in CLIP's pre-training data. Additionally, we propose a training-free MLLM-driven method, SC4CIR (Symmetric Consistency for CIR), which can effectively identify hard negative targets through 3 symmetric consistency checks. This method is plug-and-play, seamlessly integrating with various CIR methods and significantly improving performance. Our experimental results from 27 methods reveal that current ZS-CIR datasets and evaluation metrics result in inflated retrieval performance, exaggerating the capabilities of CIR methods. Our benchmark and models can be accessed at https://github.com/sotayang/ZeroSight.

AI.tldr: ZeroSight是一个面向零样本组合图像检索（ZS-CIR）的新型基准，包含基于视频的时序一致参考-目标图像对、LLM辅助的时序关系描述生成管道，以及考虑了多个正/负目标排序的评估方法。同时提出训练无关、即插即用的多模态大模型驱动方法SC4CIR，通过三重对称一致性检查有效识别难负样本，实验表明现有ZS-CIR数据集和评估指标导致检索性能被夸大。
AI.motivation: 现有ZS-CIR数据集中参考图像与目标图像常因噪声图像源而完全无关，且使用CLIP已训练过的公开图像数据集，未实现真正的零样本场景，导致检索性能被高估。
AI.method: ZeroSight基准从2022年3月31日之后发布的视频中提取帧构建时序一致的参考-目标对，确保CLIP未预训练过，并使用LLM辅助管道生成相对描述；同时提出训练无关的MLLM驱动的SC4CIR方法，通过三种对称一致性检查（双向模态匹配、跨模态语义对齐、负样本对称验证）识别难负样本，可即插即用地集成到现有CIR方法中。
AI.result: 在ZeroSight基准上对27种CIR方法进行系统评估，结果表明现有ZS-CIR数据集和评估指标导致检索性能被夸大，掩盖了CIR方法的真实能力；SC4CIR方法在多种CIR方法上均能显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: ZeroSight揭示了当前ZS-CIR评估体系存在实验设置不严谨和性能虚高问题，为领域提供了更可靠、更公正的基准评测平台；SC4CIR作为训练无关的即插即用方法，可有效提升CIR模型对难负样本的判别能力。

title: TrioPose: Native Triple-Stream Diffusion Transformers for Pose-Guided Text-to-Image Generation
comment: 15 pages (9 pages main body, 6 pages references and appendix), 3 figures, 5 tables
summary: Pose-guided text-to-image generation often suffers from limb distortions and feature crosstalk in complex multi-person scenarios. While existing UNet-based adapters struggle with long-range spatial dependencies, emerging Multimodal Diffusion Transformers (MM-DiTs) offer superior global modeling. However, naive signal concatenation in MM-DiTs severely disrupts pre-trained latent distributions. To address this, we propose TrioPose, a native pose-driven framework built upon the SD3.5M architecture. Specifically, we introduce a Triple-Stream Pose-Aware DiT (TSPA-DiT) that treats pose as an independent modality. It employs layer-wise activation and zero-initialized dual-residual injection to smoothly enforce geometric constraints while preserving pre-trained latent stability. To resolve severe multi-instance occlusions, we design a Learnable Relational Bias Mask that categorizes topological connectivity into fine-grained physical states, mapping them into continuous attention soft constraints to effectively decouple inter-instance interference. Furthermore, a Pose-Guided Spatial Loss Weighting strategy modulates the native diffusion objective using heatmap-derived error maps, focusing anatomical supervision strictly on distortion-prone regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TrioPose achieves state-of-the-art performance across challenging benchmarks, including Human-Art, CrowdPose, and OCHuman. Notably, it attains an AP of $64.33$ on Human-Art, representing a $30\%$ improvement over prior arts, while setting new standards for visual fidelity and text-image semantic alignment in complex multi-human generation.

AI.tldr: 提出TrioPose框架，通过三流姿态感知DiT、可学习关系偏置掩码和姿态引导空间损失加权，在SD3.5M上实现多人物场景下姿态引导的文本到图像生成，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于UNet的姿态引导文本到图像生成方法在复杂多人场景中存在肢体扭曲和特征串扰问题，难以处理长程空间依赖关系；新兴的多模态扩散变换器（MM-DiT）虽具有全局建模能力，但朴素的特征拼接方式会严重破坏预训练潜空间的分布稳定性。
AI.method: 基于SD3.5M架构，提出TrioPose框架，核心包括：三流姿态感知DiT（TSPA-DiT），将姿态视为独立模态，通过逐层激活和零初始化双残差注入在保持预训练潜稳定性的同时施加几何约束；可学习关系偏置掩码（Learnable Relational Bias Mask），将拓扑连接分类为细粒度物理状态并映射为连续注意力软约束以解耦多实例干扰；姿态引导空间损失加权（Pose-Guided Spatial Loss Weighting），利用热图导出的误差图调制扩散目标函数，对易畸变区域施加解剖学监督。
AI.result: 在Human-Art、CrowdPose和OCHuman等挑战性基准上达到最先进性能，在Human-Art上AP达64.33，相较此前最优方法提升30%，同时为复杂多人生成任务中的视觉保真度和文本-图像语义对齐设立了新标准。
AI.conclusion: 将姿态作为独立模态引入MM-DiT并结合层级残差注入与注意力偏置策略，能够有效解决多人场景下姿态引导生成的肢体扭曲与实例间干扰问题，为基于扩散变换器的可控生成提供了可行范式。

title: GP-Adapter: Gaussian Process CLIP-Adapter for Few-Shot Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: We propose GP-Adapter, a training-free framework that augments CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) with Gaussian Process (GP) uncertainty modeling for few-shot classification and out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. While CLIP achieves strong zero-shot recognition, it yields deterministic similarity scores and offers limited uncertainty information, which is critical under distribution shift and data scarcity. GP-Adapter constructs modality-specific, class-wise one-class GPs on top of frozen CLIP embeddings using an RBF kernel for image features and a linear kernel for text prompts and fuses their predictive statistics to produce a variance-aware confidence score for OOD detection. The method requires no fine-tuning of the CLIP backbone and relies only on a small $K$-shot cache and lightweight hyperparameter selection, with memory cost scaling as $O(CK^2)$ for $C$ classes and $K$ shots. Experiments on ImageNet and multiple OOD benchmarks show that GP-Adapter provides competitive few-shot performance and consistently improves OOD detection when combined with prompt-learning baselines, highlighting the complementarity between GP-based uncertainty modeling and prompt learning. Overall, our results suggest that integrating probabilistic inference with large pre-trained vision-language models can improve reliability in low-data and distribution-shifted settings. Code is available at https://github.com/tms-byte/GP-Adapter

AI.tldr: GP-Adapter 是一种无需训练的框架，通过为 CLIP 引入高斯过程不确定性建模，在少样本分类和 OOD 检测任务中提升性能，无需微调主干网络即可获得具有置信度感知的预测结果。
AI.motivation: CLIP 在零样本识别中表现优异，但其输出的确定性相似度分数缺乏不确定性信息，在分布偏移和数据稀缺场景下可靠性不足，现有方法也鲜有将概率推断与预训练视觉-语言模型结合以解决该问题。
AI.method: GP-Adapter 在冻结的 CLIP 嵌入之上构建模态特定的逐类单类高斯过程：对图像特征使用 RBF 核，对文本提示使用线性核，并融合两者的预测统计量（均值与方差），生成具有方差感知的置信度分数用于 OOD 检测；该方法仅依赖少量 K-shot 缓存和轻量超参数选择，内存开销为 O(CK^2)，无需微调 CLIP 主干。
AI.result: 在 ImageNet 及多个 OOD 基准上的实验表明，GP-Adapter 在少样本分类上取得了具有竞争力的性能，并且在与提示学习方法结合时持续提升了 OOD 检测效果，证明了高斯过程不确定性建模与提示学习之间的互补性。
AI.conclusion: 将概率推断（如高斯过程）与大规模预训练视觉-语言模型集成，能够有效提升模型在低数据量和分布偏移场景下的可靠性，为构建更鲁棒的识别系统提供了新思路。

title: Native3D: End-to-End 3D Scene Generation via Unified Mesh-Texture Modeling and Semantic Alignment
summary: This paper presents Native3D, the first end-to-end 3D scene generation framework that completely bypasses 2D intermediate representations. Traditional approaches typically require adapting 3D representations to the 2D domain to leverage pre-trained diffusion models, which inevitably introduces domain adaptation issues including geometric structural distortion and texture detail degradation. To address these limitations, we design a unified mesh-texture joint representation that simultaneously models both geometric structures and texture features through a Transformer-based scene encoder, effectively maintaining spatial relationships and visual consistency among objects within scenes. We further propose the 3D Representation Alignment Loss (3D REPA Loss), which employs an improved contrastive learning mechanism to align multi-level semantic representations in the latent space, significantly enhancing geometric and textural fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that Native3D outperforms existing methods in both generation quality and editing flexibility, providing a novel solution for 3D scene editing.

AI.tldr: Native3D 是首个完全绕过 2D 中间表示、实现端到端 3D 场景生成的框架，通过统一的网格-纹理联合表示和 3D REPA Loss，在生成质量和编辑灵活性上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统 3D 场景生成方法需要将 3D 表示适配到 2D 领域以利用预训练扩散模型，这种跨域适配不可避免地引入了几何结构扭曲和纹理细节退化等域适应问题，亟需一种不依赖 2D 中间表示的端到端 3D 生成方案。
AI.method: 本文提出 Native3D 框架，核心包括两方面：一是设计统一的网格-纹理联合表示，通过基于 Transformer 的场景编码器同时建模几何结构和纹理特征，有效保持场景内物体的空间关系和视觉一致性；二是提出 3D 表示对齐损失（3D REPA Loss），采用改进的对比学习机制在潜在空间中对齐多层级语义表示，显著提升几何与纹理保真度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Native3D 在生成质量和编辑灵活性两方面均优于现有方法，为 3D 场景编辑提供了一种全新的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: Native3D 验证了完全绕过 2D 中间表示进行端到端 3D 场景生成的可行性，其统一的网格-纹理联合表示与对比学习对齐策略为提升 3D 生成保真度和编辑能力提供了有效技术路径。

title: TraRA: Trajectory-level Recognition Aggregation for Video Text Spotting in Urban Surveillance
comment: 22nd IEEE International Conference on Advanced Visual and Signal-Based Systems
summary: Video Text Spotting (VTS) is essential for urban surveillance and intelligent transportation systems, enabling automated reading of street signs, vehicle markings, and scene text in video streams. However, reliable recognition remains challenging due to dynamic video factors common in surveillance scenarios, including motion blur, occlusion, and scale variation, which degrade frame-level recognition. Existing VTS methods typically perform recognition independently on each frame, leading to inconsistent and inaccurate results across sequences. To address these limitations, we propose TraRA (Trajectory-level Recognition Aggregation for VTS), a plug-and-play method that performs trajectory-level text recognition by leveraging temporal and multimodal consistency. TraRA integrates two key modules: (1) the Temporal Clustering and (2) the Vision-Language Aggregation. The former refines noisy trajectories by grouping temporally and visually coherent text instances, while the latter employs a Low-Rank Adaptation-enhanced Vision-Language model to fuse visual cues with linguistic context across frames. By aggregating information over entire text trajectories, TraRA achieves robust text recognition even under challenging surveillance conditions. Extensive experiments on four public benchmarks, including road and urban scene datasets (RoadText, BOVText, ArTVideo, and ICDAR15), demonstrate that TraRA consistently improves tracking and recognition performance over state-of-the-art VTS methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/trid2912/TraRA.

AI.tldr: 提出TraRA，一种即插即用的轨迹级文本识别聚合方法，通过时序聚类和视觉-语言聚合模块，在视频文本检测与识别任务中显著提升复杂监控场景下的识别鲁棒性，并在多个公开基准上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频文本识别方法通常逐帧独立进行识别，忽略了视频帧间的时序关联性，导致在监控场景常见的运动模糊、遮挡和尺度变化等动态因素影响下，识别结果存在不一致和不准确的问题。
AI.method: TraRA是一种即插即用的轨迹级文本识别聚合方法，包含两个核心模块：时序聚类模块通过对时序和视觉上连贯的文本实例进行聚类来优化噪声轨迹；视觉-语言聚合模块则采用低秩适配增强的视觉-语言模型，融合多帧的视觉线索与语言上下文，实现对完整文本轨迹的信息聚合与鲁棒识别。
AI.result: 在RoadText、BOVText、ArTVideo和ICDAR15四个包含道路和城市场景的公开基准数据集上的大量实验表明，TraRA在跟踪和识别性能上持续优于现有的最先进视频文本识别方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了利用时序和多模态一致性进行轨迹级聚合能够有效克服逐帧识别的局限性，为复杂监控场景下的视频文本识别提供了通用且有效的改进范式，代码已开源便于社区复现与应用。

title: AdaTok: Self-Budgeting Image Tokenization with Quality-Preserving Dynamic Tokens
summary: Image tokenizers, from 2D grids to recent 1D sequences, typically encode every image with the same fixed number of tokens. Yet visual complexity is highly heterogeneous, so a uniform budget overspends on simple inputs and underserves complex ones. Existing elastic tokenizers expose variable-length reconstructions, but often leave token length as a deployment-time operating point, a search target, or an external prediction rather than an output of the tokenizer itself. In this work, we ask whether a discrete visual tokenizer can budget itself in one pass. Our central finding is that actionable elasticity requires a representation--allocation co-design: prefixes must remain decodable across budgets, and the tokenizer must learn which prefix each image needs. We propose AdaTok, a self-budgeting discrete 1D tokenizer. AdaTok combines Prioritized Representation Learning, which orders tokens with nested tail masking and resolves budget-dependent semantic shift through Multi-Head LoRA decoder heads, with Adaptive Token Allocation, which trains a lightweight deterministic-group GRPO policy over candidate budgets. Dynamic Pareto Weighting balances fidelity and efficiency during policy training without manual trade-off sweeps. On ImageNet-1K, AdaTok-Full reaches rFID 1.31 at 256 tokens, while AdaTok-Adaptive attains rFID 1.50 using only ~118 tokens on average, outperforming discrete 1D baselines at comparable budgets. In autoregressive image generation, the shorter adaptive representation yields ~2.1x throughput over a fixed 256-token decode, suggesting that visual token count can be learned as a content-conditioned output rather than set as a fixed hyperparameter.

AI.tldr: AdaTok提出了一种自预算离散1D图像分词器，通过表示-分配协同设计，使分词器能够一次性自主决定每个图像所需的token数量，在ImageNet-1K上以平均约118个token达到rFID 1.50，并在自回归图像生成中实现约2.1倍吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分词器通常对所有图像使用固定数量的token，但视觉复杂度存在高度异质性，导致简单图像被过度编码、复杂图像编码不足；已有的弹性分词器虽支持变长重构，但token长度通常被设定为部署时的可调参数、搜索目标或外部预测，而非分词器自身的输出，缺乏真正的自预算能力。
AI.method: AdaTok包含两大核心模块：优先表示学习（Prioritized Representation Learning）通过嵌套尾部掩码（nested tail masking）对token进行排序，并利用多头LoRA解码头（Multi-Head LoRA Decoder Heads）解决预算依赖的语义偏移问题；自适应token分配（Adaptive Token Allocation）则训练一个轻量级确定性子组GRPO策略（deterministic-group GRPO policy），在候选预算上进行选择，并通过动态帕累托加权（Dynamic Pareto Weighting）在策略训练中平衡保真度与效率，无需手动权衡调参。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，AdaTok-Full在256个token下达到rFID 1.31；AdaTok-Adaptive以平均约118个token达到rFID 1.50，优于同等预算下的离散1D基线方法；在自回归图像生成任务中，自适应短表示相比固定256 token解码实现了约2.1倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: 视觉token数量可以作为内容条件的可学习输出而非固定超参数，AdaTok通过表示与分配的协同设计实现了分词器一次性自预算离散token的能力，证明了弹性分词器在提升生成效率方面具有显著潜力。

title: VeriDrive: Verifiable Counterfactual Supervision for Cost-Efficient Vision-Language Planning
summary: Vision-language driving models increasingly use reasoning supervision to bridge perception, prediction, and planning, but existing driving rationales are often free-form and expensive to generate with frontier models. We present VeriDrive, a framework for constructing planning-oriented, verifiable counterfactual supervision. VeriDrive converts driving reasoning into a structured Perception-Evaluation-Revision chain that grounds key objects in future motion, evaluates alternative ego trajectories with rule-checkable evidence, revises risky intent toward expert behavior, and produces final planning targets. To scale data construction, VeriDrive combines local generation with validator-guided selective correction, escalating only invalid or difficult samples. We build the VeriDrive dataset on nuScenes and train under the Omni-Q protocol. Controlled open-loop experiments show that VeriDrive improves L2, Collision, and Intersection over OmniDrive while reducing logged token usage, generation time, and actual paid LLM/VLM cost. These results show that auditable intermediate fields and structured revision targets can improve vision-language planning supervision under realistic annotation budgets. Code, prompts, and validator scripts are coming soon and will be released after the review process.

AI.tldr: VeriDrive 提出了一种结构化的、可验证的反事实监督框架，将驾驶推理转化为感知-评估-修正链，在 nuScenes 数据集上以更低的 token 消耗和生成成本提升了视觉-语言驾驶模型的规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言驾驶模型虽然越来越多地使用推理监督来连接感知、预测和规划，但驾驶推理文本通常是自由形式的（free-form），且依赖前沿模型生成，成本高昂；缺乏结构化的、可审计的规划监督信号。
AI.method: VeriDrive 将驾驶推理转换为结构化的 Perception-Evaluation-Revision 链：感知阶段将关键目标锚定到未来运动，评估阶段利用可基于规则验证的证据评价替代自我轨迹，修正阶段将高风险意图向专家行为修正并输出最终规划目标。数据构建采用局部生成结合验证器引导的选择性修正（validator-guided selective correction），仅对无效或困难样本进行升级处理。在 nuScenes 上构建数据集并在 Omni-Q 协议下进行训练。
AI.result: 在受控的开环实验中，VeriDrive 在 L2 误差、碰撞率和 Intersection 指标上优于 OmniDrive 基线，同时显著降低了 logged token 用量、生成时间和实际 LLM/VLM API 调用成本。
AI.conclusion: 可审计的中间字段和结构化的修正目标能够在现实标注预算约束下有效提升视觉-语言规划监督的质量，表明将结构化验证引入驾驶推理生成是提升性能与效率的可行方向。

title: Mitosis Detection in the Wild: Multi-Tumor and Context-Aware Generalization in the MIDOG 2025 Challenge
summary: Automated mitosis detection is a well-established task in computational pathology. While previous benchmarks focused on scanner-induced domain shift, clinical "real-world" application requires models to be robust across the vast variance to be expected in the histological landscape. The MItosis DOmain Generalization (MIDOG) 2025 challenge was designed to evaluate algorithmic performance across unprecedented biological and contextual diversity. We curated a test dataset of 365 cases, encompassing 12 distinct human, canine and feline tumor types, digitized across multiple scanning platforms. Moving beyond hand-selected hotspots, the challenge required detection also in random tissue areas (representative of the whole slide detection situation) and challenging areas (areas rich in hard negatives). In the second track, we introduced the classification of atypical mitotic figures (AMFs). There were 18 teams submitting to the detection track, with F1 scores ranging up to 0.740. In the AMF detection track, we had 21 submissions with balanced accuracy values up to 0.908. Our analysis reveals that while most models perform reliably in traditional hotspots, significant performance degradation occurs in challenging ROIs, where false positive rates tripled. Furthermore, performance varied significantly across the 12 tumor types, highlighting "blind spots" in current state-of-the-art architectures when encountering rare or highly pleomorphic malignancies. Moreover, we evaluated the effectiveness of ensembling and found a mean increases of 1.5 and 1.3 percentage points in F1 score and balanced accuracy, respectively. In contrast, TTA showed no relevant improvement. MIDOG 2025 demonstrates that "in the wild" mitosis detection remains a significant hurdle. The transition from hotspot-only evaluation to a multi-contextual framework provides a more realistic proxy for clinical reliability.

AI.tldr: MIDOG 2025挑战将有丝分裂检测从热点区域扩展到涵盖12种肿瘤类型、多个扫描平台和随机组织区域的"野外"场景，并引入非典型有丝分裂图分类任务，揭示了现有模型在多样本肿瘤类型和困难区域中性能显著下降的盲点，表明真实临床环境下的有丝分裂检测仍是重大挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有有丝分裂检测基准主要关注扫描仪引起的域偏移，而临床实际应用要求模型能够应对组织学景观中广泛的生物学和情境多样性，包括不同肿瘤类型、扫描平台以及非热点区域中的检测，这一研究空白亟需填补。
AI.method: MIDOG 2025挑战构建了包含365例病例的测试数据集，涵盖人类、犬科和猫科共12种肿瘤类型，经多个扫描平台数字化；检测任务从手工选择的热点区域扩展到随机组织区域（代表全切片检测场景）和困难区域（富含硬负样本），并增设了非典型有丝分裂图（AMF）分类的第二赛道。
AI.result: 检测赛道18支参赛队伍最高F1分数达0.740，AMF检测赛道21份提交的最高平衡准确率达0.908；传统热点区域模型表现可靠，但在困难ROI中假阳性率翻三倍，且12种肿瘤类型间性能差异显著；模型集成使F1分数和平衡准确率分别平均提升1.5和1.3个百分点，而测试时增强（TTA）未带来显著改善。
AI.conclusion: MIDOG 2025表明"野外"环境下的有丝分裂检测仍是重大挑战，当前最先进的架构在罕见或高度多形性恶性肿瘤中存在盲点；从单纯热点评估向多情境框架的转变能更真实地反映临床可靠性，为未来算法鲁棒性研究提供了重要方向。

title: Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Adapter for Micro-gesture Online Recognition
comment: Technical Report. 1st Place in Micro-gesture Online Recognition in 4th MiGA at IJCAI 2026
summary: Micro-gesture online recognition aims to temporally localize and classify subtle gestures in untrimmed videos. Owing to their extremely short duration, low motion amplitude, and ambiguous visual cues, capturing discriminative spatiotemporal representations remains highly challenging. Existing parameter-efficient adapters typically employ a single branch to model spatial and temporal cues jointly, which may fail to capture the fine-grained patterns of micro-gestures. To address this limitation, we propose a Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Adapter that decomposes video adaptation into independent temporal and spatial branches via lightweight depthwise convolutions. In addition, to address the long-tail distribution problem in the benchmark dataset, we introduce Adaptive Soft Balanced Augmentation, which dynamically allocates augmentation intensity based on class rarity and learning difficulty, without manual thresholds. Our method achieves an F1 score of 0.43808, ranking 1st in Track 2 of the 4th EI-MiGA-IJCAI Challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文针对微手势在线识别中时空表征难以捕捉细粒度模式的问题，提出时空解耦适配器（Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Adapter）将视频适配分解为独立的时序和空间分支，并引入自适应软平衡增强（Adaptive Soft Balanced Augmentation）处理长尾分布，最终在第四届EI-MiGA-IJCAI挑战赛Track 2中以0.43808的F1分数获得第一名。
AI.motivation: 微手势在线识别面临手势持续时间极短、运动幅度小且视觉线索模糊的挑战，现有参数高效适配器通常采用单分支联合建模时空信息，难以捕获微手势的细粒度模式；此外，基准数据集存在长尾分布问题，进一步增加了识别难度。
AI.method: 提出时空解耦适配器（Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Adapter），通过轻量级深度可分离卷积将视频适配过程分解为独立的时序分支和空间分支，以分别捕获时域和空域中的细粒度模式；同时提出自适应软平衡增强（Adaptive Soft Balanced Augmentation），根据类别稀有度和学习难度动态分配数据增强强度，无需手动设定阈值，以缓解长尾分布问题。
AI.result: 该方法在第四届EI-MiGA-IJCAI挑战赛Track 2中取得0.43808的F1分数，排名第一，验证了时空解耦建模与自适应增强策略在微手势在线识别任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将时空建模解耦为独立分支能够更有效地捕获微手势的细粒度时空表征，自适应增强策略可无需人工调参地缓解长尾分布问题，为微手势在线识别提供了实用的改进方向。

title: Watch, Remember, Reason: Human-View Video Understanding with MLLMs
summary: Video understanding is being rapidly transformed by multimodal large language models (MLLMs), as research moves from short clips to long, multimodal, and knowledge-intensive video scenarios. These scenarios require models to handle sparse evidence, long-range dependencies, multimodal alignment, and reliable inference under limited computational budgets. This work presents a human-view perspective on LLM-based video understanding, organized around three functional abilities: watching, remembering, and reasoning. Rather than treating video tasks as isolated benchmarks, this view provides a unified structure for analyzing how video MLLMs acquire evidence, preserve context, and produce grounded outputs. We introduce a formulation that characterizes video understanding systems by their perceptual representations, memory states, reasoning traces, and final predictions. Based on this formulation, we identify challenges in spatio-temporal perception, efficient long-video processing, memory modeling, streaming understanding, and faithful reasoning. Representative methods are organized by their roles in video MLLM systems. Watching covers fine-grained, comprehensive, audio-visual, and efficient perception. Remembering includes offline and streaming memory, while reasoning covers text-only reasoning and thinking with videos. We further examine application domains such as egocentric, sports, instructional, medical, and narrative videos, and cover training datasets and evaluation benchmarks across task types, supervision formats, modalities, and capability dimensions. Finally, we outline open problems and future directions for scalable, memory-aware, and evidence-grounded video intelligence. Related works will be continuously traced at https://github.com/marinero4972/Awesome-HumanView-VideoUnderstanding.

AI.tldr: 本文从人类视角出发，提出了一种基于"观看、记忆、推理"三大功能能力的统一框架来分析基于大语言模型的视频理解系统，系统梳理了感知表示、记忆状态、推理轨迹和预测输出等核心要素，并总结了长视频处理、跨模态对齐、可信推理等关键挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解研究通常将视频任务视为孤立的基准问题，缺乏统一的结构性视角来系统分析视频多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在获取证据、保持上下文和产生可信输出方面的能力。随着研究从短视频向长视频、多模态、知识密集型场景发展，模型面临稀疏证据、长程依赖、多模态对齐和有限计算资源下的可靠推理等挑战，亟需一个统一的框架来组织和分析这些能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种以人类视角为基础的视频理解统一框架，围绕三大功能能力（观看、记忆、推理）进行组织。观看涵盖细粒度感知、全局感知、音视频感知和高效感知；记忆包括离线记忆和流式记忆；推理包括纯文本推理和结合视频的推理。该框架通过感知表示、记忆状态、推理轨迹和预测输出四个要素表征视频理解系统，并据此识别了时空感知、高效长视频处理、记忆建模、流式理解和可信推理等挑战。
AI.result: 本文系统性地梳理了视频MLLM领域的代表性方法，按其在观看、记忆、推理三大能力中的角色进行分类；涵盖了包括第一人称、体育、教学、医学和叙事视频等应用领域；整理了各类任务类型、监督格式、模态和能力维度下的训练数据集和评估基准。相关工作将持续在GitHub仓库中追踪更新。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供的统一视角为分析视频MLLM系统提供了结构性框架，指出了实现可扩展、记忆感知和基于证据的视频智能所面临的关键开放问题，包括时空感知、高效长视频处理、记忆建模、流式理解和忠实推理等，并明确了未来研究方向。

title: Dash2Sim: Closed-Loop Driving Simulation from in-the-wild Dashcam Videos
summary: Self-driving simulations typically rely on data collected in a small number of cities or on hand-authored synthetic scenarios. Dashcam videos cover a far broader range of locations and situations, including rare or long-tailed scenarios. They are considered less usable for simulation because it is difficult to recover accurate 4D scenes from monocular in-the-wild videos. Work zones are one such class of long-tailed situations that dashcams capture. We present Dash2Sim, a framework that turns in-the-wild monocular dashcam videos into metric, geo-referenced 4D driving logs compatible with existing simulators, and verifies eachone against an independently maintained map without annotations. We apply Dash2Sim to a large video corpus to create the ROADWork4D benchmark dataset, which spans 4,244 scenes with 2.7M 3D objects across 17 cities. On a verified subset ROADWork4D-CL (2,201 scenes), we study privileged closed-loop planners and find that work zone scenarios are difficult: while rule-based and hybrid planners generalize better than learning-based ones, all fall short, failing to make the lane changes that temporary work zone channels require. Beyond planning, dense depth recovered by Dash2Sim improves novel-view synthesis quality by up to 19% on perceptual metrics, suggesting its potential to provide rich conditioning for closed-loop sensor simulation from monocular videos.

AI.tldr: 提出Dash2Sim框架，将单目行车记录仪视频转化为度量级、地理参考的4D驾驶日志，并构建ROADWork4D基准数据集，发现工作区场景对现有规划器构成重大挑战，同时展示了在闭环传感模拟和新型视图合成方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶仿真依赖少量城市采集数据或手工合成的场景，难以覆盖现实世界中广泛存在的工作区等长尾场景；虽然行车记录仪视频涵盖了更丰富的场景，但由于难以从单目在野视频中恢复精确的4D场景，这类数据被认为不太适用于仿真。
AI.method: 提出Dash2Sim框架，将从单目行车记录仪视频中恢复的度量级、地理参考的4D驾驶日志与现有仿真器兼容，并利用独立维护的地图进行无需标注的验证；基于此框架从大规模视频语料库中构建了ROADWork4D基准数据集，包含来自17个城市的4,244个场景和270万个3D物体。
AI.result: 在ROADWork4D-CL验证子集（2,201场景）上测试闭环规划器，发现规则基和混合规划器优于学习型规划器，但所有规划器均难以完成临时工作区通道所需的变道操作；Dash2Sim恢复的密集深度可将新视图合成质量的感知指标提升高达19%。
AI.conclusion: 工作区场景对现有自动驾驶规划器（无论规则基、混合还是学习型）构成重大挑战；Dash2Sim不仅使单目行车记录仪视频可适用于仿真，其密集深度恢复能力还能显著提升闭环传感模拟中的新视图合成质量，为从单目视频中获取丰富仿真条件提供了新途径。

title: RealDocBench: A Benchmark for Field-Level QA and Layout Understanding on Real-World Regulated Documents
summary: Document parsing systems are increasingly deployed in high-stakes, regulated workflows such as mortgage underwriting, financial reporting, supply-chain logistics, and clinical records. Yet most public benchmarks evaluate parsers on clean academic layouts or synthetic prose, and report a single OCR or markdown-level similarity score. Such documents and metrics correlate poorly with what downstream agents actually need: the correct value for a specific field on a messy real-world page. We introduce RealDocBench, a two-track benchmark built from real regulated documents. The QA track contains 1,356 field-level questions over 581 documents spanning four domains, where each question is paired with a typed gold_dict of key-to-value answers and parsers are scored on both per-field and strict per-question accuracy. The layout track contains 1,500 human-verified page images annotated with COCO-style bounding boxes under a nine-class public taxonomy, scored with a Hungarian matcher that includes adjacency-aware split/merge recovery. We evaluate eighteen systems, spanning commercial parsing APIs, general-purpose VLMs, and open-source OCR models, under a uniform extraction-and-scoring protocol, and report accuracy alongside per-page cost and cache-busted latency. RealDocBench exposes a wide performance spread that single-number benchmarks hide, a persistently hard medical sub-domain, and sharp cost/latency trade-offs across operating points. We release the datasets, parser adapters, and evaluation harness to support reproducible, field-level comparison of document parsing systems.

AI.tldr: RealDocBench是一个面向真实监管文档的解析基准测试，包含1,356道字段级QA题目和1,500张布局标注页面，通过对18个系统的评估揭示了当前文档解析模型在字段级准确率、成本与延迟方面存在的巨大差异，以及单数值指标所掩盖的性能缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有文档解析基准大多基于整洁的学术布局或合成文本进行评估，且仅报告OCR或Markdown级别的单一相似度分数，这些指标与下游实际应用（如抵押贷款审批、财务报告）所需要的字段级精准取值严重脱节，无法反映模型在真实脏乱页面上的关键字段提取能力。
AI.method: RealDocBench包含两条评测轨道：QA轨道涵盖四个领域的581份文档、1356个字段级问题，每个问题配有类型化的gold_dict键值对答案，按逐字段和严格逐题两种方式评分；布局轨道包含1500张人工验证的页面图像，采用九类公开标签体系的COCO格式边界框标注，并使用带有邻接感知合并/拆分恢复的匈牙利匹配器评分。作者统一协议评估了18个系统，包括商用解析API、通用视觉语言模型和开源OCR模型，同时报告准确率、每页成本和基于缓存清除的延迟。
AI.result: RealDocBench暴露了单数值指标所隐藏的广泛性能差异，识别出一个持续困难的医疗子领域，并揭示了不同操作点之间尖锐的成本/延迟权衡。实验覆盖了18个商用API、通用VLM和开源OCR模型，在统一的提取与评分协议下给出了详细的字段级准确率与效率对比。
AI.conclusion: RealDocBench为文档解析系统的字段级评估提供了标准化基准，其多维度评测方式能够揭示被传统单一指标掩盖的系统真实能力差异，数据集、解析适配器和评估框架已开源以支持可复现的对比研究。

title: DisPOSE: Projected Polystochastic Diffusion for Self-Supervised Multi-View 3D Human Pose Estimation
summary: Recovering 3D human poses for multiple individuals from different camera views is a fundamental bottleneck for analyzing interacting behaviors. Existing self-supervised approaches leverage synthetic catalogues of 3D poses; however, this leads to poor generalization in real-world scenarios due to distribution shifts. We therefore introduce DisPOSE, a self-supervised framework that approximates the inherently discrete multi-view person-assignment problem as a generative diffusion process over the space of polystochastic tensors. By employing differentiable Sinkhorn projections during denoising, our model learns to guide solutions toward valid and feasible assignments based on 2D image priors. The complete 3D skeletons of localized individuals are then regressed using a Hypergraph-Convolutional Decoder that explicitly models relational structures and articulated joints across multiple views. The proposed approach outperforms current state-of-the-art self-supervised methods on standard datasets and demonstrates strong performance on a newly proposed benchmark featuring highly occluded scenes from surgical operating rooms. Our diffusion-based localization demonstrates high label efficiency, retaining 99% of its performance with only 10% of the pseudo-labels. Notably, disentangling the assignment and root regression components while maintaining differentiability makes DisPOSE nearly agnostic to different camera arrangements.

AI.tldr: DisPOSE是一个自监督框架，通过将多视角多人3D姿态估计中的分配问题建模为多随机张量空间上的生成式扩散过程，并结合可微Sinkhorn投影去噪与超图卷积解码器，实现了无需标注的高效3D人体姿态恢复，在标准数据集和高度遮挡的手术室场景中均达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督多视角多人3D姿态估计方法依赖合成3D姿态目录，在真实场景中因分布偏移导致泛化能力差，且多视角下的人物分配问题本质上是离散组合优化问题，难以端到端可微求解。
AI.method: DisPOSE将多视角人物分配问题建模为多随机张量（polystochastic tensors）空间上的生成式扩散过程，在去噪过程中使用可微Sinkhorn投影引导解向有效的分配矩阵收敛，并利用2D图像先验进行约束；最后通过超图卷积解码器（Hypergraph-Convolutional Decoder）从多个视角回归完整3D骨骼结构，显式建模关节间的关系统一结构与跨视角关联。
AI.result: 该方法在标准数据集上超越现有最优自监督方法，并在新提出的高度遮挡手术室场景基准上表现优异；其扩散式定位模块具有高标签效率，仅使用10%的伪标签即可保留99%的性能，且将分配与根节点回归解耦的设计使其对相机布局几乎无关。
AI.conclusion: DisPOSE通过扩散过程与可微分配机制有效解决了多视角人物分配这一离散问题的端到端学习，同时通过解耦分配与回归实现了对任意相机布局的鲁棒性，为自监督多视角3D姿态估计提供了新范式。

title: Skill-3D: Evolving Scene-Aware Skills for Agentic 3D Spatial Reasoning
summary: This paper explores agentic 3D spatial understanding, i.e., MLLM agents performing 3D reasoning through tool use. Existing methods often misuse tools and exhibit biased tool preferences under 3D scenarios, leaving the agentic paradigm with only marginal gains over non-agentic strategies. We reveal that 3D spatial reasoning tasks are heterogeneous across scenes, while these agents apply a uniform tool-use strategy to all scenes rather than selecting tools according to the specific scene and task. To address this, we propose Skill-3D, a framework that learns self-evolving scene-aware skills. Specifically, Skill-3D identifies the task scene and records the agent's tool-use trajectory into a Scene Memory, where successful trajectories from similar scenes are aggregated and distilled into a reusable scene-aware skill, with failed ones attached to the skill as lessons. During training, once a similar scene recurs, the corresponding skill is injected to guide the agent, producing new trajectories whose successes and failures further refine the skill, forming a loop in which the memory and the skill library co-evolve. Experiments show that Skill-3D substantially improves tool utilization in 3D spatial reasoning (from 39% to 78% on VSI-Bench), driving the agent toward correct and sufficient tool use. For instance, it improves Gemini-3-Flash by 67% on MMSI-Bench. Furthermore, we conduct agentic post-training over skill-guided trajectories, which boosts Qwen3-VL-8B by 43% on VSI-Bench.

AI.tldr: Skill-3D 提出了一种自进化的场景感知技能学习框架，通过记录、聚合和蒸馏工具使用轨迹为可复用的场景感知技能，解决了现有 3D 空间推理智能体对工具的误用和偏置问题，在 VSI-Bench 上将工具利用率从 39% 提升至 78%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的 3D 空间推理智能体在 3D 场景中普遍存在工具误用和偏置的工具偏好问题，导致其性能相较于非智能体策略仅有轻微提升；其根本原因在于 3D 空间推理任务具有跨场景的异构性，而现有智能体对所有场景采用统一的工具使用策略，未能根据具体场景和任务选择合适的工具。
AI.method: Skill-3D 框架通过识别任务场景并将智能体的工具使用轨迹记录到场景记忆（Scene Memory）中，从中聚合相似场景的成功轨迹并蒸馏为可复用的场景感知技能（scene-aware skill），同时将失败轨迹附加为经验教训；当相似场景再次出现时，注入对应技能引导智能体，产生的新的成功/失败轨迹进一步优化该技能，形成记忆与技能库共同进化的闭环。
AI.result: 在 VSI-Bench 上，Skill-3D 将工具利用率从 39% 提升至 78%，驱动智能体实现正确且充分的工具使用；在 MMSI-Bench 上，Gemini-3-Flash 的性能提升了 67%；通过基于技能引导轨迹的智能体后训练（agentic post-training），Qwen3-VL-8B 在 VSI-Bench 上提升了 43%。
AI.conclusion: Skill-3D 验证了通过场景感知的技能学习和进化机制能够显著改善 3D 空间推理智能体的工具使用行为，揭示了针对异构任务场景进行差异化工具选择而非统一策略的重要性，为构建更鲁棒的 3D 智能体推理范式提供了可行的技术路径和实证支持。

title: Implicit Data Synthesis for Contrastive Unsupervised Data Augmentation
summary: Scientific observations generate large quantities of unlabeled data which is laborious to hand-label, making unsupervised learning techniques valuable for processing datasets. Among these approaches, contrastive learning provides a convenient mechanism for extracting structural representations from unannotated datasets. For natural imagery, the general approach is to use a variety of data-space augmentation methods in order to generate synthetic samples; however, for scientific observations data-space perturbations can fundamentally alter the underlying data. Our proposed method is to generate contrastive samples by perturbing the network weights rather than the underlying data, thus more closely preserving the structure of the data. We demonstrate this technique using a SimCLR-based pipeline applied over radar observations of meteors, and show performance gains under matched protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在权重空间而非数据空间生成对比学习样本的方法，用于科学观测数据（如雷达流星观测）的无监督表征学习，实验表明该方法在匹配协议下优于传统数据增强方法。
AI.motivation: 科学观测数据大量且标注困难，依赖无监督学习技术；但传统的对比学习方法依赖数据空间增强来生成正样本，对于科学观测数据而言，数据空间的扰动可能从根本上改变底层数据的物理结构，因此需要一种能够保留数据原始结构信息的对比样本生成策略。
AI.method: 提出在神经网络权重空间施加扰动以生成对比样本，替代传统的数据空间增强方法；该方法基于SimCLR框架，通过对网络权重而非输入数据进行扰动来构造正样本对，从而在保留原始数据物理结构的同时实现对比学习。
AI.result: 在雷达流星观测数据上，基于权重扰动的对比学习方案在匹配实验协议下相较于传统数据增强方法取得了性能提升，验证了该方法在科学观测数据无监督表征学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，对于科学观测数据这类对数据空间扰动敏感的任务，权重空间扰动是一种更合适的对比样本生成方式，能够更好地保留数据底层结构，为科学领域的无监督学习提供了新的技术路径。
